text: NoSQL databases use non-relational models optimized for specific data patterns and scalability. Four types: Key-Value (Redis, DynamoDB), Document (MongoDB, Couchbase), Column-Family (Cassandra, HBase), Graph (Neo4j, Amazon Neptune). Choose NoSQL for: flexible schema, horizontal scaling, specific data models (graphs, time-series).
Key-Value: simplest — `get/set` by key, ultra-fast, no query language.
